description: A smiling couple, a man and a woman, are taking a selfie while sitting on a bench outdoors. The woman is in the foreground on the left, with long dark hair and a colorful patterned dress, looking directly at the camera. The man is to her right, wearing a grey baseball cap and a dark t-shirt, also smiling at the camera. They are seated in a park-like setting with trees and manicured bushes in the background. Sunlight filters through the leaves, creating a warm and pleasant atmosphere. In the distance, there are hints of buildings and a landscape, suggesting an urban or semi-urban environment.
location_context: Outdoor park or garden area with distant buildings visible.
